# Introduction

<!-- Scientific name
Description of general biology and distribution
Description of key life history characteristics specific to stock assessments (e.g., special features of reproductive biology)
Evidence of stock structure, if any, and if available reference the stock structure template  -->

<!-- For update assessments, reference the last full operational stock assessment for the full description of the general biology and life history. 
Include abbreviated text highlighting relevant information for making management decisions. -->


## Biology and Distribution

## Stock Structure
